metadata.name: Conduct a Site Visit for an Event Planner

description: A potential client for a large conference is visiting the hotel to see the facilities.

nodes.task_description: Greet the client and review their event requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: The sales manager understands the client's needs.

nodes.task_description: Provide a guided tour of the relevant spaces: ballroom, breakout rooms, and guest rooms.

expected_outcome.expected: The client is shown all relevant facilities.

nodes.task_description: Answer any questions the client has and follow up with a formal proposal after the visit.

expected_outcome.expected: The sales manager effectively showcases the hotel and follows up professionally.
